description_long: This is a classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a long, slender metal barrel. The stock is made of dark-stained wood, extending from the butt to the midsection, providing a sturdy grip and shoulder support. The barrel and receiver are constructed from dark metal, with visible iron sights mounted at the front and rear for aiming. The rifle features a trigger guard and a bolt handle, both made of metal, and an internal magazine, likely loaded from the top or bottom. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, typical of mid-20th-century military rifles. The finish is matte, with minimal gloss, and the rifle appears well-maintained but not ornate.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and long metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a matte finish.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow barrel profile and front sight post.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metal barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the butt end, showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the overall length of the rifle.
